title: phyllanthus standleyi
intro: Phyllanthus standleyi, also known as Standley's tree or West Indian gooseberry, is a small shrub native to the West Indies and Central America. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its rich source of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus standleyi include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties, which can help in reducing liver damage, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus standleyi include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
